mapper.sql: select post_id, user_id, post_type, language, title, content, images, tags, view_count, like_count, comment_count, is_pinned, is_featured, is_deleted, status, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time from edu_post
mapper.select: select p.post_id, p.user_id, p.post_type, p.language, p.title, p.content, p.images, p.tags, p.view_count, p.like_count, p.comment_count, p.is_pinned, p.is_featured, p.is_deleted, p.status, p.create_by, p.create_time, p.update_by, p.update_time, u.nick_name as userName, u.avatar as userAvatar from edu_post p left join sys_user u on p.user_id = u.user_id where (p.language = #{language} or p.language = 'all') and p.is_deleted = 0 order by p.like_count desc, p.view_count desc limit #{limit}

select p.post_id, p.user_id, p.post_type, p.language, p.title, p.content, p.images, p.tags, p.view_count, p.like_count, p.comment_count, p.is_pinned, p.is_featured, p.is_deleted, p.status, p.create_by, p.create_time, p.update_by, p.update_time, u.nick_name as userName, u.avatar as userAvatar from edu_post p left join sys_user u on p.user_id = u.user_id where p.user_id = #{userId} and p.is_deleted = 0 order by p.create_time desc

select p.post_id, p.user_id, p.post_type, p.language, p.title, p.content, p.images, p.tags, p.view_count, p.like_count, p.comment_count, p.is_pinned, p.is_featured, p.is_deleted, p.status, p.create_by, p.create_time, p.update_by, p.update_time, u.nick_name as userName, u.avatar as userAvatar from edu_post p left join sys_user u on p.user_id = u.user_id where p.status = 'published' and p.is_deleted = 0 order by p.create_time desc limit #{limit}
mapper.insert:
insert into edu_post
user_id, post_type, language, title, content, images, tags, status, create_by,
#{userId}, #{postType}, #{language}, #{title}, #{content}, #{images}, #{tags}, #{status}, #{createBy},
mapper.delete: update edu_post set is_deleted = 1 where post_id = #{postId}

update edu_post set is_deleted = 1 where post_id in
#{postId}
mapper.update: update edu_post set view_count = view_count + 1 where post_id = #{postId}
update edu_post set like_count = like_count + 1 where post_id = #{postId}
update edu_post set like_count = like_count - 1 where post_id = #{postId} and like_count > 0
update edu_post set comment_count = comment_count + 1 where post_id = #{postId}
